title: Frostly
description: A mod created especially for the New Year holidays! It brings a whole set of holiday decor to Minecraft
body: A mod created especially for the New Year holidays! It brings a whole set of holiday decor to Minecraft: wall stockings that can hold an item, gifts that can hold up to three items, a Christmas star, garlands, and ornaments. The mod also adds a candy cane, which gives a speed boost when consumed, and a candy block.
